title: Meta is adding ridiculous ‘rate limits’ and a soft paywall to its smart glasses
summary: Meta is implementing a $19.99/month subscription to unlock extended use of its Conversation Focus AI feature on smart glasses; free users are limited to 3 hours monthly while premium subscribers get 15 hours. The move monetizes AI capabilities on hardware users already own.
content:
Would you pay $20 a month for access to AI hardware you already own? That appears to be one of Meta's next bets. This week, it quietly announced that your glasses' Conversation Focus feature will soon be limited to three hours of use per month, unless you pay for a $19.99 Meta One Premium subscription. 
In a help article, the company insists that it won't require a subscription to use your glasses, period; it's merely erecting a "rate limit" for certain AI features. Even premium subscribers will only get 15 hours of Conversation Focus per month under that "rate limit," it claims.
Problem is, Meta's rate limit is ridiculous. The Conversatio …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Meta 在智能眼镜中添加荒谬的"使用限制"和软付费墙
zh.summary: Meta 正在实施 $19.99/月 的订阅服务，以解锁其智能眼镜上 Conversation Focus AI 功能的扩展使用；免费用户每月限制 3 小时，而高级订阅者获得 15 小时。此举将 AI 功能货币化，这些功能运行在用户已拥有的硬件上。

title: Anthropic’s long-sidelined Fable 5 is greenlit to return
summary: After negotiations with the Trump administration, Anthropic has received clearance to restore access to Claude Fable 5, which was sidelined in June due to export controls. The company will begin redeploying the model immediately.
content:
After weeks of negotiating with the Trump administration, Anthropic is finally going to be able to bring Claude Fable 5 back online. In a post on X, Anthropic said it plans to begin restoring access tomorrow.
Anthropic:
We've received notice that the Department of Commerce has lifted export controls on Claude Fable 5 and Mythos 5.
We'll begin restoring access tomorrow, and will share an update soon.
We're grateful to our users for their patience, and to everyone who worked with us on redeploying the models.
In early June, Anthropic sidelined Fable 5 - its consumer-facing model built the same underlying technology as Anthropic's My …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Anthropic 长期被搁置的 Fable 5 获准回归
zh.summary: 经过与特朗普政府的谈判后，Anthropic 获得了恢复 Claude Fable 5 访问权限的许可，该模型由于出口管制在 6 月被搁置。该公司将立即开始重新部署该模型。
